message:
fix(http,resources): harden Transfer-Encoding aggregation and fail closed on invalid package manifest paths

HTTP client (src/http/client.rs):
Aggregate repeated Transfer-Encoding headers across multiple header
lines per RFC 7230. Require "chunked" to appear as the final encoding
(not just anywhere in the list), and reject unsupported transfer
encodings rather than silently falling through to content-length. Add
three regression tests covering repeated headers, non-final chunked
rejection, and non-chunked rejection.

Package resources (src/resources.rs):
Fail closed on invalid package manifest entries instead of silently
ignoring them. Reject absolute paths, path traversal above the package
root (../), empty path entries, and non-string array elements in
pi.extensions/skills/prompts/themes. Replace extract_string_list with
extract_manifest_string_list and resolve_manifest_resource_path that
validate and resolve paths within the package root. Add tests for
invalid entry types and outside-root paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
